articles.title: Scientists found the “holy grail” gene that could one day help humans regrow limbs
articles.description: Scientists studying axolotls, zebrafish, and mice have uncovered a shared set of genes that may one day help humans regrow lost limbs. By identifying powerful “SP genes” involved in regeneration, researchers discovered that disabling these genes stopped proper bone regrowth in salamanders and mice. They then used a gene therapy inspired by zebrafish biology to partially restore regeneration in mice, marking a major step toward future treatments that could replace damaged limbs with living tissue instead of prosthetics.

articles.title: Four south Florida men convicted in Haitian president’s assassination
articles.description:
Men were convicted in Miami federal court for plotting to kill Jovenel Moïse at his Port-au-Prince home in 2021
Four south Florida men were convicted on Friday of plotting to kill the Haitian president, Jovenel Moïse, in 2021 by hiring mercenaries to assassinate him at his Port-au-Prince home, court records show.
Prosecutors argued during the nine-week trial in a Miami federal court that the men assembled two dozen former Colombian soldiers and supplied them with money, guns, ammunition and tactical vests in a conspiracy to kill Moïse. The 53-year-old president was shot dead in July 2021 at his private residence in the hills above Port-au-Prince, a killing that left a gaping political vacuum in the Caribbean nation and emboldened powerful gangs.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: New obesity discovery rewrites decades of fat science
articles.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising secret hidden inside fat cells that could reshape how we think about obesity and metabolic disease. A protein called HSL, long believed to simply release stored fat when the body needs energy, turns out to have a second job deep inside the nucleus of fat cells—helping keep those cells healthy and balanced. Even more surprising, people and mice missing this protein don’t become obese as expected; instead, they lose fat tissue in a dangerous condition called lipodystrophy.

articles.title: Vijay is reliving his ‘Bigil’ movie character as he scouts for MLAs to take the field: 2019 parallel to a 2026 thriller
articles.description: In 2019, coach Michael Rayappan needed 11 players to field a football team. In 2026, CM-aspirant Vijay needs similar number of MLAs to form a govt.

articles.title: Jagan accuses Naidu govt of using police machinery to suppress dissent
articles.description: Jagan accuses Naidu govt of using police machinery to suppress dissent

articles.title: EC publishes Index Cards for Assembly polls
articles.description: According to the data, total votes polled in West Bengal were 6,38,42,843, of which 6,32,58,138 were valid votes. In Assam, the corresponding figures were 2,16,84,656 and 2,13,97,936. Tamil Nadu polled a total of 4,93,89,958 votes and 4,91,24,329 were valid while in Kerala, 2,16,30,208 votes were polled and 2,14,71,988 were valid

articles.title: Casual sexism and ‘harmless’ jokes force women into silence at workplaces, says panel
articles.description: Speakers at Telangana’s ‘Stand With Her’ discussion say microaggression, tokenism and gender stereotypes continue to shape emotionally unsafe environments for women at work and home

articles.title: Indian sailor killed after dhow catches fire near Strait of Hormuz; 17 rescued
articles.description: A fire aboard a wooden dhow near the Strait of Hormuz resulted in the death of one Indian sailor and injuries to four others. Seventeen Indian crew members were rescued by a passing vessel. The incident occurred amidst heightened regional tensions, with recent exchanges between Iran and the United States in the vital shipping lane.

articles.description: The accused later invited the complainant to his apartment in Vyttila on April 18, 2024, where he "sexually assaulted" her.

topStories.title: Democrats shy away from questions on whether Harris should run for president in 2028
topStories.description: House Democrats are shying away from endorsing Kamala Harris for a 2028 presidential run as names like Newsom, Shapiro and Whitmer are also being discussed.

topStories.title: A vast dam across the Bering Strait could stop the AMOC collapsing
topStories.description: If a key ocean current collapses it could plunge northern Europe into a big freeze. Now researchers are weighing up a drastic intervention – building a 130-kilometre-wide dam between the US and Russia

topStories.title: Frontier Airlines jet reports striking an individual on runway at Denver airport
topStories.description: A Frontier Airlines flight taking off for Los Angeles from Denver International Airport on Thursday night appeared to strike an individual walking on runway 17L.

topStories.title: Bitcoin holds near $80,000 after rejection at $82,500; ETF outflows trigger cautious sentiment
topStories.description: Bitcoin hovers near the $80,000 mark. Experts note cautious sentiment following outflows from US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs. Major altcoins like XRP, BNB, and Solana saw gains. The global crypto market capitalization increased. Institutional demand continues to support the market. Bitcoin's resilience near $80,000 indicates underlying strength.

topStories.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Star-Studded Three Opening Ceremonies
topStories.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 celebrations will also extend to special July 4 tributes marking America's 250th anniversary during two knockout-stage matches in the U.S.

topStories.title: Goldman Sees Fed Cuts Delayed to December, March on Inflation
topStories.description: Goldman Sachs said it pushed back expectations for the US Federal Reserve’s next two rate cuts by one quarter to December 2026 and March 2027 as inflation proves stickier than anticipated.

topStories.title: Wembanyama powers Spurs past T-Wolves as Knicks beat Sixers in NBA playoffs
topStories.description: San Antonio take 2-1 semifinal series lead over Minnesota, while New York Knicks are 3-0 up against Philadelphia 76ers.

topStories.title: ABC argues Trump administration is trying to chill free speech
topStories.description: In a filing, ABC accuses the Trump administration of trying to chill its constitutionally protected free speech. The point of contention: "The View," and whether it's subject to equal time rules.

topStories.title: Trump says Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a 3-day ceasefire
topStories.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Yuri Ushakov, President Vladimir Putin's foreign affairs adviser, both confirmed the agreement for a three-day ceasefire and an exchange of prisoners.

topStories.title: Two 'dangerous' inmates escape Kentucky detention center, sparking multi-agency manhunt across region
topStories.description: Two inmates described as dangerous escaped from a Kentucky detention center Friday, prompting a multi-agency manhunt led by Kentucky State Police.

topStories.title: U.S. fires on 2 more tankers as Washington awaits Iran response on deal
topStories.description: The U.S. military says its forces fired on two Iran-flagged oil tankers to stop them from docking at an Iranian port in violation of the U.S. blockade in the area.

topStories.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
topStories.description: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon says 1 survivor after latest strike on alleged drug boat kills 2
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military's latest strike on an alleged drug-trafficking boat in the eastern Pacific Ocean killed two men Friday while leaving one survivor.

dailyNews.title: Newsom's 'Golden State Start' promises 400 free diapers per baby as California grapples with budget woes
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom announces Golden State Start, a new California program offering 400 free diapers to every family with a newborn starting this summer.

dailyNews.title: Some viewers absolutely slammed Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl halftime show and complained to the FCC
dailyNews.description: Bad Bunny's Super Bowl halftime performance sparked wild FCC complaints ranging from alleged nudity to grievances about Spanish-language lyrics.

dailyNews.title: RFK Jr. launches plan to curb antidepressant 'overprescription'
dailyNews.description: A new federal initiative aims to curb "overprescribing" of psychiatric medications while emphasizing holistic care.

dailyNews.title: Man who survived hantavirus 24 years ago, but lost mom and sister, recounts experience
dailyNews.description: In 2002, Zermeño found out he contracted hantavirus after cleaning the family house following the death of his mother and sister. He had been exposed to rodent droppings and became infected.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Great gift ideas to make Mother's Day memorable for mom
dailyNews.description: ABC News Live's Stephanie Ramos talks to parenting expert Katy Huie Harrison about Mother's Day gifts that can help mom relax on her day.

dailyNews.title: U.S. military kills two alleged narco-terrorists in lethal strike on drug vessel in Eastern Pacific
dailyNews.description: U.S. Southern Command says it carried out a lethal strike on a suspected narco-trafficking vessel in the Eastern Pacific, killing two on board Friday.

dailyNews.title: U.F.O. Files Released by U.S. Shed Light on What the Government Knows
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon on Friday released online what it called “new, never-before-seen” files, dating back decades, related to unidentified flying objects.

dailyNews.title: Alabama lawmakers pass plan for new House primary as state pushes to redistrict
dailyNews.description: Alabama lawmakers have approved a plan for new House primaries if courts allow the state to use different congressional districts in this year's elections.

dailyNews.title: After struggling for years to make ends meet, a daughter opened her home to her mother
dailyNews.description: Boca Raton is one of the wealthiest cities in Florida, but even along its golden sands, people still get stuck in fiscal undertows.

dailyNews.title: Sixers fan comes up with diabolical plan to keep Knicks fans out of town for Game 4
dailyNews.description: A clever 76ers fan hatched a plan on Reddit to buy refundable Amtrak Flex tickets and drive up surge pricing for Knicks fans heading to Game 4 in Philly.

dailyNews.title: Volcano erupts in Indonesia, killing at least 3 hikers, police say
dailyNews.description: Three hikers in an off-limits area died in an eruption of Indonesia's Mount Dukono volcano, police said.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Wants to Strip 12 Immigrants of U.S. Citizenship
topStories.description: The targeted Americans are accused of misdeeds that can qualify them to lose citizenship, but denaturalization has rarely been invoked in the past.

topStories.title: White House prepares to replace FDA leader Marty Makary amid agency turmoil
topStories.description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary has faced criticism over his leadership of the agency that oversees vaccine and drug approvals.

topStories.title: U.S. and Iran exchange fire as Trump says ceasefire still holds
topStories.description: U.S. fighter jets struck two Iranian oil tankers accused of violating a U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, as Iran launched new missile and drone attacks targeting the United Arab Emirates. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

topStories.title: Trump Plans to Fire F.D.A. Commissioner Marty Makary
topStories.description: Dr. Makary has been a supporter of the Make American Healthy Again Movement but made some enemies in the administration over vaping, the abortion pill and rejections of new drugs.

topStories.title: Trump reportedly plans to fire FDA Commissioner Marty Makary
topStories.description: The plan isn't final and could change, but his ouster would be no surprise.

topStories.title: Facing Pressure, Trump Officials Reject Claims They’re Softening on Immigration
topStories.description: Immigration hard-liners have grown frustrated with the level of deportations and the Department of Homeland Security’s attempts, under its new secretary, to stay under the radar.

topStories.title: ABC refuses to capitulate to Trump admin, fights FCC probe into The View
topStories.description: FCC chair hasn't been able to bully ABC and owner Disney into submission.

topStories.title: Trump Gave Out a No-Bid Contract to Turn D.C.’s Reflecting Pool Blue
topStories.description: President Trump handpicked a firm he said had worked on his swimming pool to repair the iconic site near the Lincoln Memorial.

topStories.title: Why the Trump-Xi Summit Matters, Even if Little Seems to Come of It
topStories.description: The war in Iran, trade, artificial intelligence and Taiwan are expected to be on the agenda. But expectations are modest.

topStories.title: China’s Exports and Imports Set Records in April Amid High Energy Costs
topStories.description: The country’s exports surged and its trade surplus with the United States widened ahead of President Trump’s scheduled visit next week to Beijing.

dailyNews.title: 6 videos that stood out in the Pentagon's new UFO drop
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon on Friday began releasing hundreds of files on UFOs after President Trump ordered the documents to be made public. CBS News Pentagon reporter Eleanor Watson reviewed the 28 videos in the first batch of files and chose six that stood out to her the most.

dailyNews.title: Trump says UFO files released to maximize transparency
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said it's time for the American people see it for themselves, as the Pentagon started releasing previously classified documents related to UFOs and UAPs. CBS News Pentagon reporter Eleanor Watson has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump considering firing FDA head Dr. Marty Makary, source says
dailyNews.description: Though a final decision has not been made, a source familiar with the matter says President Trump is considering firing Dr. Marty Makary after frustration with his performance as FDA commissioner. NBC News’ Anne Thompson explains.

dailyNews.description: U.S., Iran exchange strikes as Trump says ceasefire holds

dailyNews.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
dailyNews.description: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

dailyNews.title: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.

dailyNews.title: U.S. says it struck two Iran-flagged oil tankers trying to skirt blockade
dailyNews.description: The shaky U.S. ceasefire with Iran has been repeatedly undermined this week, even as President Donald Trump insists it remains in effect.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
